content.en:
"That's the real innate multi-dimensional treasure!!!"

Ye Tian couldn't believe that there was a real innate multi-dimensional treasure here.

Not far ahead, a wooden knife was suspended there, wrapped in a large amount of robbery fire, and there was a large amount of robbery thunder on it, which was constantly bombarding this wooden knife.

Although Ye Tian does not have a truly complete innate multi-dimensional treasure, he can be sure that this wooden knife is a complete innate multi-dimensional treasure.

"Strange, why is there one here-Innate Multidimensional Treasure?"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

You must know that the innate multi-dimensional treasures are almost all in the hands of those fifth realms, and the fourth realm only has some quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasures, or incomplete innate multi-dimensional treasures.

And the real innate multi-dimensional treasure is hundreds or even thousands of times more valuable than the quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure.

It can even be said that no matter how many quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasures there are, they can't exchange them for a real innate multi-dimensional treasure.

An innate multi-dimensional treasure is enough for countless Fourth Realms to snatch desperately, and even the Fifth Realm will make a move.

"It is impossible to give birth to the innate multi-dimensional treasure of the wood system in the midst of the calamity, which is unreasonable. Unless there is an extradimensional realm that places it here, otherwise it won't make sense!"

Ye Tian wanted to take away this innate multi-dimensional treasure, but found that the fire robbery here was abnormal, and the thunder was too terrifying.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies forced it over, and was directly burned by the robbery fire, and then directly killed by a robbery thunder.

But.

He also learned a little bit from it and learned something about it.

"It's definitely done by the Fifth Realm!"

Ye Tian can be sure.

Because there is a trace of the formation here, but the strong man who arranges the formation is too terrifying, and uses special means to use the fire and thunder robbery here as the foundation of the formation, just like the innate multi-dimensional array.

If it is an ordinary fourth realm, you can't see anything at all, and even if you can see the formation, you can only think that it is a multi-dimensional formation formed by nature.

But Ye Tian could see that there were traces of a strong man's move here.

Obviously, that Fifth Realm was refining this innate multi-dimensional treasure with tribulation fire, and then beating it with tribulation thunder.

As for why he did this, Ye Tian was not very clear.

"Maybe the Lord of the Extinction Realm knows!"

Ye Tian was going to ask the Extinction Realm Lord.

......

Territory of four thousand five hundred.

Ye Tian and the Extinction Realm Lord reunited.

At this time, the aura of the Extinction Realm Lord was even stronger, and it was estimated that he was about to have the combat power of the Fifth Heaven Pass, thanks to the assistance of the second innate multi-dimensional Dao body, otherwise there would be no way to improve so quickly.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, what are you looking for me to do this time?"

The Lord of the Extinction asked.

"Extinction Realm Lord, I have discovered an innate multi-dimensional treasure!" Ye Tian said.

"Oh!"

The Lord of the Extinction Realm was surprised.

Ye Tian didn't say what kind of innate multi-dimensional treasure it looked like, but said: "That innate multi-dimensional treasure was burned by robbery, beaten by robbery and thunder, and has the means of the fifth realm arrangement, what is the situation?"

When the Extinction Realm Lord heard this, he was shocked.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, could it be that you went to the Heavenly Spider Battlefield and saw this scene in the Heavenly Spider Battlefield?" asked the Extinction Realm Lord in shock.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"It was made by a certain Fifth Realm, and he wanted to advance the Innate Multidimensional Treasure!" explained.

"Let the Innate Multi-Dimensional Arcana Advance Level?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Yes!" the Extinction Realm Lord continued: "Once the Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure is conceived, it is difficult to continue to advance, but those Fifth Realms have developed a way, that is, to use the power of the Multi-Dimensional Tribulation, and finally found that using the power of the Multi-Dimensional Tribulation to refine the Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure, as long as you find the right way, you can make the Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure advance, and the Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure that has only advanced once is called the First Tribulation Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure, which means that a great tribulation has been passed. I don't know how many eons the Innate Multidimensional Treasure you see is, but it's definitely the arrangement of a powerful Fifth Realm. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

The Lord of the Extinction Realm said, "Don't touch that arrangement, or you will surely die." With the means of the fifth realm arrangement, you can definitely make the sixth day pass or even the fourth realm of the seventh day pass fall, unless you have the combat power of the eighth day pass, you can hope to take that innate multi-dimensional treasure. But now that the Eighth Heaven Guan combat power is still alive, it is only one person, and because of this, those Fifth Realm people are not afraid of someone destroying their arrangement. "

"The Fifth Realm can't enter the Heavenly Spider Battlefield now, so the arrangement should have been arranged during the last Multidimensional Tribulation, right?" Ye Tian guessed.

"Well, it should be accurate when the multidimensional catastrophe is about to end, they arranged it, so there will be no risk. After nine multi-dimensional tribulation time, such a long time, as long as the arrangement is not destroyed, there is a high probability that the innate multi-dimensional treasure will be able to survive another tribulation. There are more innate multi-dimensional treasures of one tribulation and two tribulations, but it is very rare to have innate multi-dimensional treasures that exceed three tribulations, and sometimes even after many multi-dimensional tribulations, it is still difficult to advance. "The Lord of the Extinction Realm.

Ye Tian chatted with the Extinction Realm Lord for a long time, and also learned more about the Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure.

At the same time, he also knew very well that no matter how he arranged the Fifth Realm, they were helpless.

Because the multidimensional tribulation has not yet arrived, they cannot enter the Celestial Spider Battlefield.

An unguarded innate multi-dimensional treasure, even if it is dangerous, Ye Tian still doesn't want to give up.

"I don't believe that I can't take the innate multidimensional treasure here. "

Ye Tian's copy body sat cross-legged in front of the arrangement of the Fifth Realm, silently observing the wooden knife.

Through careful observation, he observed the robbing patterns from the wooden knife.

"Three Sword Tribulation Pattern, according to the Extinction Realm Lord, this is the Three Tribulation Innate Multi-dimensional Supreme Treasure!!"

Ye Tian took a deep breath, this was much more powerful than the ordinary innate multidimensional supreme treasure, it was definitely a certain superdimensional realm powerhouse at the peak of the fifth realm, and it was estimated that he was also the top one in the entire four thousand number one territory.

He is not afraid of offending the Fifth Realm, even if it is an ordinary Sixth Realm, he can't deduce his traces, what is he afraid of?

"It's definitely not good, the power of fire robbery and thunder robbery is too terrifying, I don't know if I can create a multi-dimensional mastery that can resist fire robbery and thunder robbery?"

He had created his own Wind Tribulation Hand, and he could use the power of the Wind Tribulation so that he would not be harmed by ordinary Wind Tribulation, and naturally he also hoped to create a similar multi-dimensional mastery.

"This is probably the only way, just do it!"

Ye Tian began to use all his strength to create the Four Realms and Multi-dimensional Masters in terms of Fire Tribulation and Thunder Tribulation, and for this reason, he used a replica body to feel the power of the two great tribulations.

Gradually, he felt more and more deeply.
